data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Temporary equipment loan during repair', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the execution or availability of a loaner mini-fridge during the repair process. While the linked use case states that a loaner mini-fridge is offered, it does not provide any evidence of this being implemented or confirmed in the system, leading to a clear gap in the evidence supporting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the provision of a temporary equipment loan during the repair.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Check for loaner equipment records
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that a loaner mini-fridge was offered and recorded during the repair process.
